ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to find dining.html edits in transcript logs."}
CodeContent:
"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        content = data.get("content", "")
        tool_calls = str(data.get("tool_calls", ""))
        if "dining.html" in str(content) or "dining.html" in tool_calls:
            print(f"Step {data.get('step_index')}: type={data.get('type')}, source={data.get('source')}, created_at={data.get('created_at')}")
            if data.get("type") == "CODE_ACTION":
                print("--- Code Action diff ---")
                print(content[:500] + "...")
"
Description: "Find history of dining.html edits in logs"
